description.initial: You're sailing through the northern reaches of the great ocean. The water here is deep blue, almost purple, and remarkably calm. The coast is a distant line to the west, while the open sea stretches endlessly east and south. Occasionally, dolphins break the surface, arcing gracefully before disappearing again.
description.return: The northern ocean. Calm waters stretch in every direction.
description.atmospheric: The rhythmic slap of waves against your vessel creates a hypnotic soundtrack. Salt air fills your lungs.

north.blockedMessage: Rocky cliffs and dangerous shoals block passage to the north.

west.blockedMessage: The coast here is all sheer cliffs. There's no landing possible.

interactables.name: Dolphins
interactables.examineText: A pod of dolphins follows your vessel, seemingly playing in the wake. Their joyful energy is contagious.
